title: WellbeingAction
description: A recommend-only proposal, produced by Module 9 (Focus & Mental Health), to create a task or goal linked to a money stressor identified from consumed contracts. Recommend-only: nothing is created until the user confirms it through a Confirm-Action sheet (FR-X-003, FR-FOC-001/002). Focus originates NO monetary value — any money figure shown is read as-provided (integer cents) from the source contract and carries that source's FreshnessStamp; a stale MONEY input is withheld, not asserted as fresh (Constitution IV/VIII). Conversion is idempotent, keyed on (stressor_entity_ref, session_id) (FR-X-003, platform-decisions §4). Provided to Tasks (Module 7) and Workspace (Module 13). Well-being content is sensitive PII: this payload carries only the minimal action label + typed entity reference, never free-text distress journaling (FR-X-013, FR-X-014).

profile_id.description: Scopes ownership. Every read is authZ-checked server-side against the validated session identity, never a client-supplied profile_id (FR-HH-001). Well-being data is private-by-default and never exposed across household members regardless of MemberScope (FR-FOC-005).

session_id.description: The FocusSession (stress_pack or wind_down) that produced this proposal. Part of the idempotency key.

stressor.description: Typed reference to the underlying entity causing money stress. The action links by reference, never by copying the figure (FR-FOC-001).

kind.description: Stressor class. Safety precedence (display/handling order): runway → credit_card (hard-avoid) → bill → goal (ux-foundations §10.4).

entity_ref.description: Canonical entity reference, e.g. 'bill:{bill_id}', 'goal:{goal_id}', 'runway:{profile_id}:{period}', 'card:{account_id}'. Part of the idempotency key. Never a free-text description.

source_contract.description: The consumed contract this stressor was derived from (provider-owned, read-only).

money_input_state.description: State of the stressor's underlying MONEY input. When stale_withheld or absent, money_figure_cents MUST be null and the proposed_action MUST be a non-money action (FR-X-008; the session still pairs support with a concrete action per FR-FOC-001).

money_figure_cents.description: Optional provider-owned money figure for context (e.g. at-risk bill amount, runway shortfall), integer minor units (CAD cents), read AS-PROVIDED. Focus performs no arithmetic/FX/rounding. MUST be null when money_input_state is not 'fresh'. Rendered via @finos/format (fr-CA '1 234,56 $').

proposed_action.description: The single concrete action proposed (FR-FOC-001: exactly one per session/stressor). Recommend-only.

action_type.description: create_task → dispatched to Tasks (Module 7); create_goal → dispatched to Spine goals; refresh_data → the non-money fallback when the money input is stale/absent.

label_fr.description: User-facing action label, French (fr-CA). A missing fr label is a bilingual defect (Constitution II, FR-X-005).

target.description: Where the confirmed action is dispatched. Echoes the stressor entity link so the created task/goal stays connected to the source entity.

linked_entity_ref.description: The stressor entity_ref the created task/goal links back to. null for refresh_data.

informational_only.description: MUST be true. Focus provides non-clinical, informational decision support only — never clinical advice, never regulated financial advice (Constitution Quality Standards; ux-foundations §8.5).

idempotency_key.description: Canonically derived from (stressor.entity_ref, session_id). A UNIQUE constraint on this key guarantees a replay/re-run creates at most one task/goal (FR-X-003, platform-decisions §4).

status.description: proposed = awaiting user confirmation; confirmed = user approved via Confirm-Action and the task/goal-creation request was dispatched (audited); skipped = user explicitly skipped (re-offered next session); already_captured = a still-open task/goal already exists for this stressor (not re-created); resolved = the underlying stressor resolved out-of-band (per source contract).

reasoning.description: Bilingual explainability envelope (FR-X-006): the stressor inputs (kind, entity_ref, source freshness, optional provider money figure) and the rationale that produced this proposal. inputs MUST NOT contain free-text distress content (FR-X-014).

freshness.description: Inherited from the stressor's source contract. is_stale=true on a MONEY input ⇒ money_figure_cents is withheld (null) and the action falls back to refresh_data (FR-X-008).
